title: WorldQuant 101 Formulaic Alphas — time-series subset as meta features
source: User asked to analyze arXiv:1601.00991 (Kakushadze et al., 101 Formulaic Alphas); quant-phd-advisor delivered verdict 2026-05-31.
why: The paper is a catalog of 101 cross-sectional price-volume alphas for US equities (dollar-neutral, holding 0.6-6.4 days, low ~15.9 pct pairwise correlation). Its documented edge emerges from combining many weak alphas across HUNDREDS of names via cross-sectional diversification — a mechanism absent in a single-instrument universe. Most alphas use rank()/IndNeutralize()/scale() operators that COLLAPSE to constants on one instrument (rank of a single asset is always 1.0). A small subset (~10-20 of 101) is purely time-series and computable single-instrument (Alpha#101 = (close-open)/((high-low)+0.001), ts_rank, correlation(x,y,d), decay_linear).
value_rationale: LOW. Does NOT attack the real bottleneck (trade-count starvation <30/fold that kills the stack gate) — alpha-style signals do not raise trades-per-fold. Touches the orthogonal-features bottleneck only WEAKLY. High probability the MDA per-fold discards them. Volume caveat: our volume is MT5 tick_volume (not real volume), so volume-dependent WorldQuant alphas lose predictive power.
scope: Select 5-8 PURELY time-series alphas (no rank/IndNeutralize/scale): Alpha#101 intrabar geometry, ts_rank/correlation/decay_linear over OHLC; avoid volume-heavy ones given synthetic tick_volume.
Add as columns in pipeline/features.py build_technical_features and _build_h4_technical (NOT as primaries — rank() collapses single-instrument).
Strict windows <= t (no centering/normalizing over a window including the future) to preserve anti-lookahead.
Cheap validation (~half day): run pipeline with/without features; check top-10 MDA per-fold and lift_vs_primary / DSR movement. If MDA ignores them, discard.
recommendation: IMPLEMENT-PARTIAL, low priority — only if time remains at end of sprint. NOT as primaries. Verdict confidence ~0.85 (cross-sectional structure triple-confirmed by external sources).
out_of_scope: Porting alphas as primaries (rank collapses single-instrument). Full cross-sectional multi-asset rebuild (rank the 8 H4 assets each bar) — would make the paper directly relevant but is a MAJOR architecture change out of sprint scope and not in the current spec.

history.reason: Logged quant-phd-advisor verdict on arXiv:1601.00991 per user request.
